title: Planned water outage: Bos en Dal
description: GEORGE NEWS - There is a planned water...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - There is a planned water outage on Tuesday 3 February from 10:00 to 18:00 facilitate construction work.


> The following areas will be affected:


- Lang Street
- Bos en Dal

In the event of any unforeseen circumstances that delay the planned work, the water outage will be rescheduled to Wednesday 4 February from 10:00 to 18:00.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
